extract: Walking Wake (Japanese: ウネルミナモ Uneruminamo) is a dual-type Water/Dragon Paradox Pokémon introduced during Generation IX. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Walking Wake is said to be either an ancient relative of Suicune or a version of it from a parallel timeline. Walking Wake was revealed alongside Iron Leaves during the Pokémon Presents that aired on February 27, 2023, and debuted that same day in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet's Version 1.2.0 update.
